NAVAREA XIX 133/17
ANDOYA TEST CENTER WILL CONDUCT A NUMBER OF MILITARY TEST DAILY BETWEEN 0900 AND 1400 UTC FROM 30 OCT TO 3 NOV
CONTACT GUARD VESSEL FOR INFORMATION.
COORDINATES FOR DANGER AREA:

A. 69-12.9N 016-36.6E
B. 69-14.3N 016-49.4E
C. 69-21.2N 016-48.8E
D. 69-32.6N 016-55.0E
E. 69-41.1N 015-48.7E
F. 69-26.0N 014-59.0E
E. 69-21.4N 015-28.1E
F. 69-27.7N 015-48.9E
G. 69-24.5N 016-14.6E
H. 69-12.9N 016-36.6E

REEFERS TO NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 19/17
